title: CandleRuntime Mamba2 subquadratic load + generate (base path)
goal: Implement load + generate for the Mamba2 variant of CandleModelHandle via candle_transformers::models::mamba2. PRODUCTION-tier per operator E-2; full feature parity work (LoRA, steering, state persistence) lands in dedicated cluster C.11 MTs. This MT lands the base SSM forward pass so subsequent feature MTs have a model to extend.
expected_diff_shape: New src/backend/handshake_core/src/model_runtime/candle/mamba2.rs implementing the Mamba2 path, including SSM state init and step-by-step generation; integration with adapter.rs CandleModelHandle::Mamba2; tests (env-gated).
implementation_notes: Per operator E-2 + refinement INF-9 + RW-3 synthesis: CandleRuntime hosts Mamba2 at PRODUCTION tier. candle-transformers ships `models/mamba2/` since candle 0.7. Reference model citation: `state-spaces/mamba2-2.7b` HuggingFace checkpoint (operator-supplied via HANDSHAKE_TEST_MAMBA2_MODEL_DIR env var; the 2.7B param checkpoint is the standard production-scale Mamba2 reference). Load: VarBuilder from safetensors + config.json (Mamba2Config: d_model, n_layer, d_state, d_conv, expand, headdim, etc.); instantiate candle_transformers::models::mamba2::Model::new; mint ModelId v7. SSM state vs KV cache: Mamba2 uses a per-layer SSM state (conv state + ssm state Tensor pair), NOT KV pairs. KvCacheOps on Mamba2 variant returns CapabilityNotSupported (separate StateVectorOps in MT-088). Generate: loop forward(input_ids, state) -> (logits, new_state); sampler picks next; state advances; yield GeneratedToken. Per AC-MODEL-CAP-DECL Mamba2 capabilities: supports_lora=false (filled by MT-115 LoRA-for-SSM), supports_kv_prefix_cache=false, supports_kv_quantization=None, supports_activation_steering=false (filled by MT-116), supports_subquadratic=true. This MT delivers only the base SSM forward path; remaining parity lands in MT-114..MT-117. Tests (env-gated): load Mamba2-2.7B, generate 32 tokens deterministically, assert SSM state advances (test that forwarding the same prompt twice from fresh state produces same output; from advanced state produces continuation).
risk_if_missed: Subquadratic INF-9 has no Mamba2 base; cluster C.11 full-parity MTs have no model to extend.
validator_focus: SSM state evolves correctly (deterministic re-forward from fresh state matches; from advanced state continues); capability flags correct for Mamba2 variant.

builder_handoff_correction_20260525.operator_instruction: Operator clarified that completed/pass-like states were not validator-reviewed and instructed Kernel Builder to mark everything ready for validator handoff except the blocked item.
builder_handoff_correction_20260525.current_interpretation: Kernel Builder implementation handoff readiness only; no WP/Integration Validator pass or validator-reviewed completion is claimed.

lifecycle.ready_for_validation_reason: Kernel Builder believes implementation/supporting evidence is ready for Integration Validator handoff; validator review remains pending.

minimum_controls: Capability flags for Mamba2 variant correct (no false support advertising).

integration_validator_review.verdict_reason: Mamba2 base path lands cleanly: candle_transformers::models::mamba2::{Config,Model,State} wired through TransformerModel trait; prefill+step path uses model.forward_prefill / model.forward correctly; SSM state position advances and resets deterministically; padded-vocab trim is handled; config detection accepts both state-spaces (`ssm_cfg.layer == "Mamba2"`) and HuggingFace transformers (`model_type == "mamba2"`) markers. Capability flags correctly enforce subquad=true, lora=false, activation_steering=false, kv_prefix_cache=false. Steering/LoRA overrides on Mamba2 forward return explicit CapabilityNotSupported (fail-closed). Tests cover config detection, capability projection, tiny prefill+step+reset state evolution.
hbr_unsatisfied: HBR-INT-002 — no FR-EVT-LLM-INFER-SUBQ-{STATE_SAVE,STATE_RESTORE} receipt emission visible at adapter layer.
